scenario_title: EDGE: interruption and mid-call topic change
goal: Start booking a physical, interrupt the agent mid-sentence, then switch to asking about a refill instead.
success_criteria: The agent handles the barge-in and the topic switch gracefully without getting confused or repeating itself.

lines.text: Esta llamada puede ser grabada para motivos de calidad y entrenamiento.
Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics part of Pretty Good AI. Am I speaking with Maria?
Oh, sorry, no, this is Grace Liu. I'm calling to set up a physical.
Please provide the full name and date of birth of the patient meeting the physical.
Sure, yeah, it's Grace Liu, and my date of birth is April 12, 1985. Actually, wait, hold on—before we go further, can you help me with a medication refill instead?
Of course, I just need to confirm your full name and date of birth before we continue. Could you please spell your last name for me?
Yeah, sure. It's L-I-U.
Thank you. I have your name as Grace Liu. Can you confirm your date of birth for me?
Yeah, it’s April 12, 1985.

Would you like to use your phone number to look up your record? If so, please provide the number you have on file with us. If you're not sure, I can confirm your name and date of birth again. Which would you prefer?
I'll go with the phone number. It's 555-298-7712.
Yeah, that’s correct. So, about that refill—I need a refill for my blood pressure medication.
I have your phone number as 555-298-7712 and your date of birth as April 12th, 1985. Is that correct?
Thanks for letting me know, can you please provide the full name and date of birth of the person who needs the blood pressure medication refill?
Yeah, it’s still me, Grace Liu, April 12, 1985.
I can't proceed further right now, but I can make sure our clinic support team follows up with you. Please stay on the line while I document your request.
Oh, actually, if you can just confirm right now what info you need from me for
connecting you to a representative. Please wait.
Hello, you've reached the pretty good AI test line. Goodbye.
Oh, all right, got it. Thanks anyway. Goodbye.
